mano_cua.result_summary: 遮罩高亮区域圆角缺失——在 Chrome 中测试（原测试要求 Safari），高亮区域显示为 90 度直角矩形，无任何 border radius 圆角效果。多个 tour step 的高亮区域均呈方角，corners 未平滑处理。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The highlighted/cutout region has sharp/square corners with no visible border radius. The corners are straight 90-degree corners without rounding. This was confirmed across multiple tour steps. The expected behavior is smooth rounded corners on the highlight cutout area.
